briefdescription.para: Scroll started signal type.
Scroll finished signal type.
Scrolling signal type.
Drag started signal type.
Drag finished signal type.
Dragging signal type.
Creates an uninitialized ScrollView handle.
Copy constructor.
Move constructor.
Destructor.
Copy assignment operator.
Move assignment operator.
Sets the content view to be scrolled.
Gets the content view.
Sets the scroll position.
Gets the current scroll position.
Sets the direction of the scroll.
Gets the direction of the scroll.
Sets the maximum distance by fling action.
Gets the maximum distance by fling action.
Sets the minimum duration of fling scroll animation.
Gets the minimum duration of fling scroll animation.
Sets the maximum duration of fling scroll animation.
Gets the maximum duration of fling scroll animation.
Sets the sensitivity of fling action.
Gets the sensitivity of fling action.
Sets the deceleration rate of fling.
Gets the deceleration rate of fling.
Sets the over scroll mode.
Gets the over scroll mode.
Sets the visibility of the vertical scroll bar.
Gets the visibility of the vertical scroll bar.
Sets the visibility of the horizontal scroll bar.
Gets the visibility of the horizontal scroll bar.
Gets a value indicating whether the scroll is currently in progress.

simplesect.para: True if scrolling is in progress

briefdescription.para: Scrolls the content to the specified position.
Scrolls the content to the specified child view.

parameterdescription.para: The child view to scroll to
The position to scroll the child to

briefdescription.para: Scrolls to the specified X position (for horizontal scrolling).
Scrolls to the specified Y position (for vertical scrolling).
Signal emitted when scroll starts.
Signal emitted while scrolling.
Signal emitted when scroll finishes.
Signal emitted when drag starts.
Signal emitted while dragging.
Signal emitted when drag finishes.
Creates an initialized ScrollView.

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: Downcasts a handle to ScrollView handle.

simplesect.para: A handle to a Layout or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: ScrollView is a scrollable container that displays content larger than its viewport.

detaileddescription.para: ScrollView provides pan gesture support for navigating content that exceeds the view's visible area, based on OneUI Scrollable component design.

Key features:
Pan gesture detection for scrolling
Configurable scroll direction (vertical/horizontal/both)
Content management
Scroll position control with animation
Fling/inertia scrolling with velocity tracking
Edge effects for over-scrolling
Scroll event signals
Drag event signals
